description: Phrases that have been identified as counterproductive, misleading, or damaging in Stayful sales meetings. Each entry includes the forbidden phrase, why it fails, and a safer alternative.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: We guarantee X income per month
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: STR income cannot be guaranteed. Making a guarantee creates a legal and trust liability.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Based on comparable properties in your area, our data shows an average of X per month. I'll show you the month-by-month breakdown.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: We can negotiate on the fee
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Opens fee negotiation from a position of weakness. 15% should be held as the standard. Tactical reductions are available but should never be offered proactively.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: 15% is our management fee. Let me show you what you actually keep after it — the number is higher than you might expect.

forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Factually false for winter months. Sets expectations that will not be met. Destroys trust when January comes.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Summer months we're typically 85-90%+. January is our lowest, around 60%. The annual average across comparable properties is around 75-80%.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Your previous management company was terrible
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Unprofessional. Lead may have mixed feelings. Positions Stayful as negative rather than better.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: It sounds like that experience was really frustrating. Here's specifically how we handle [their issue].

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Don't worry about damage, it almost never happens
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Dismisses a genuine concern. Certainty-seekers will disengage when concerns are waved away.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: It's a fair concern. Here's exactly how it's handled: the £250 damage waiver, the AirCover platform insurance, and the guest vetting process.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Take all the time you need
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Kills momentum. Vague permission to delay is not helpful for either party.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Of course. What specifically do you need to feel ready? Let's get that in front of you now and agree on when we'll speak next.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: STR is always better than LTL
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Not always true. Some properties or personal situations genuinely suit LTL better. Overclaiming damages credibility.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: For your specific property and situation, the data shows STR generates [X] more per year. Let me show you the comparison.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Rent-to-rent is fine, we can work with that
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: R2R model is structurally incompatible with Stayful in most cases. Saying yes without verifying landlord consent creates a serious liability.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Let me understand the lease arrangement first. Does your landlord know you're running STR? We'd need them as the contracting party.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Your property will be perfect for Airbnb
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Overselling without data. If performance disappoints, trust is destroyed.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Based on what you've told me, I'd expect your property to perform like [comparable]. Let me pull the STR net analyser to confirm.

forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Stayful manages approximately 70 properties. Overstating scale is a lie that can be easily checked.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: We have around 70 properties across Leicestershire and Leeds. That means Zac knows every owner personally. You won't be a number.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: The London 90-day rule doesn't apply to you
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Do NOT make this claim without verifying planning status. Incorrect advice could expose the owner to enforcement action.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: For London properties, there's a 90-day annual limit under planning rules unless you have an exemption. We'd need to verify your property's planning status before proceeding.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: STR income is very stable month to month
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: It isn't. Seasonal variance is real. Claiming otherwise builds false expectations.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: There is seasonal variation — summer peaks, winter dips. The annual average is strong. Here's the month-by-month breakdown.

forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Tax is absolutely an issue for some owners, especially overseas residents. This is not Stayful's area to dismiss.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Tax treatment varies by situation. I'd recommend running it past your accountant. I'm not a tax adviser, but I can share how most of our owners handle it.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Just sign and you can sort the details later
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Rushing anyone to sign without understanding the agreement creates churn, disputes, and damaged trust.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Read through the agreement at your own pace. Here are the three main things to look at: [explain]. Any questions before you sign?

forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: NEVER minimise what happened to Ihsan. His property was used for criminal activity under a previous management arrangement. This caused severe personal harm. Full operational guest vetting detail is required.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: What happened to you was completely unacceptable and I understand why trust is the core issue. Let me walk you through exactly how we vet every guest before they step foot in a property.

forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: 12%+VAT has been offered exactly once in the entire portfolio history. It is an exceptional case. Offering it without Zac's explicit approval is not permitted.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Our standard rate is 15%. For the right situation, 13% is possible. Anything below that requires specific approval.

forbidden_phrases.phrase: Our competitors aren't as good as us
forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Naming and criticising competitors is unprofessional and can backfire. Let Stayful's model speak for itself.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: I'll let you compare us directly. Here's specifically what Stayful does: [list the differentiators without naming competitors].

forbidden_phrases.why_forbidden: Stayful is selective. Not every property is suitable for STR. Taking poor-fit properties damages portfolio quality and owner satisfaction.
forbidden_phrases.safe_alternative: Let me assess whether your property is a good fit first. Not every property performs well on STR and I'd rather tell you that upfront than sign you up and disappoint you.
